sp_widget.name: CS Portal - Reserve Wizard
sp_widget.template:
Reserve a Space

1 Select Space
2 Date & Time
3 Confirm

Select a Space

Choose a community space to reserve.

Select Date & Time

Choose when you'd like to use the space.

Confirm Reservation

Review your reservation details before submitting.

Space: {{c.getSelectedSpace().name}}
Date: {{c.form.date}}
Time: {{c.form.start_time}} - {{c.form.end_time}}
Details: {{c.form.event_details}}
{{c.data.message}}

Reservation Submitted!

{{c.data.message}}

Reference: {{c.data.reservationNumber}}
